headline: MOH Wins Illinois Medicaid Contract, Reinforcing Long-Term Stability
summary: Molina Healthcare secures an Illinois Medicaid managed care contract starting in 2027, reinforcing its position in a key market and supporting long-term growth.

headline: Centene's Impressive Comeback Still Holds Up
summary: Centene delivered a strong Q1, raising the 2026 adjusted EPS outlook above $3.40 and driving a 90% stock gain since my last Buy call. Learn more about CNC stock here.
